atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the @tailwind directive to insert Tailwind's base, components, utilities and variants styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the @apply directive to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the @layer directive to tell Tailwind which bucket a set of custom styles belong to.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use the @config directive to specify which config file Tailwind should use.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use the @theme directive to define custom theme values.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Use the @source directive to specify additional source paths.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Use the @variant directive to apply a Tailwind variant to styles within your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Use the @custom-variant directive to define a custom Tailwind variant.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Use the @utility directive to define a custom Tailwind utility.
